data.summary: [8/20 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[8/20 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 19
📷 Period: Permanent 
📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2626139

#BlueArchive
